ValidationRule.description: Recordtype can not be changed after Child exist(ed)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId), OR( ValHasPackage__c=true, ValHasTime__c=true, ValHasExpense__c=true, ValHasSupplierCosts__c=true, ValHasInvoicePos__c=true ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Pacakge Type can not be changed anymore due to existing child objects (time, expense, supplier costs, Invoices). Please contact your Super User for assistance.﻿ (PA004)
